Composite Doors

Composite doors are a popular option, creating a fantastic first impression and offering a wide range of benefits.

uPVC Doors

French Doors

Patio Doors

Bi-fold

Bifold doors are the modern alternative to traditional patio and French doors.

Stable

Why choose Safestyle?

Safestyle has a long brand history which spans over 30 years. Our customers across England, Wales & Scotland have been consistently impressed by our low prices, high quality, energy-efficiency, and security that comes with our windows, doors & roofline.

Recycle your old windows and doors to SAVE

Find out more

Registered office: Safestyle, Liberator Road, Norwich, NR6 6EU. Company registration no. 2540020.

Safestyle is a trading name of ASHI Group Limited and is a credit broker, not a lender, authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA). FCA Register no: 302334. The register can be accessed through https://www.fca.org.uk

We can offer credit from a Representative 12.9% APR over a term from 36 months. Rates may vary subject to status. We work with a panel of lenders, with the lender being dependent on your location. Credit is available to UK Residents aged 18/21 and over (dependent on lender) and is subject to affordability, status and lending criteria. Deposits start from £249 for windows and doors. Safestyle receive an introduction fee when you open an account.

Safestyle’s policy is one of continued development and in accordance with this, we reserve the right to amend specification of our products as their development dictates. Images and colours are for indication purposes only. We therefore advise you see a physical example before choosing your final style & finish.
